coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 90% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 15:00 at 90%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/2. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/2. 15:00 at 90%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/2. Power: 90-90%, Cadence: 88-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 8:00. Then 19min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 45-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 8:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 8:00 at 55%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 2/2. 61% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 90% × 15:00. Then 4min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 15:00 at 90%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 90% for 15:00. Then 4min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 90% × 15:00. Seated, 75-85 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 91% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 91% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
